items.title: Pakistan Outlines 4% Growth Target For Next Fiscal Year
items.summary: Pakistan aims to grow at a slightly faster pace in the upcoming fiscal 2027 even as the crude price shock from the Middle East war clouds the outlook for the nation that continues to rely on support from the International Monetary Fund.

items.title: Iran attacks damage 20 US military sites since start of war, satellite images show
items.summary: Analysts told BBC Verify that Tehran's strikes were more extensive than publicly acknowledged.

items.title: Война в Украине - у Украины растет шанс на перемирие
Turkey’s Economy Surprises With Slower Than Expected Growth
items.summary: Turkey’s economy grew slower than expected in the first quarter, signaling that the the fallout from the Iran war is weighing on activity.

items.title: Goldman Sachs: Oil Price Swings Hurt China Manufacturing
items.summary: Hui Shan, Chief China Economist at Goldman Sachs, says oil price fluctuations due to the war in Iran have negatively affected China's factory activity, which showed signs of weakness in May. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: UK House Prices Plunge as Loan Costs Bite, Nationwide Says
items.summary: UK house prices fell at the fastest pace for almost a year, according to one of Britain’s biggest mortgage lenders, suggesting the surge in borrowing costs triggered by the Iran war is placing a strain on prospective homebuyers.

items.title: Oil Prices Climbs on Uncertainty Over US-Iran Deal
items.summary: Oil rose from a six-week low as uncertainty continues over the outlook for a peace deal to end the US war in Iran and open the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg's Anthony di Paola reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: EM Stocks Hit Record High on AI, Currencies Lower as Oil Climbs
items.summary: Emerging Asian equities rose to a record, propelled by continuing enthusiasm for the artificial intelligence trade that’s bolstered global stocks despite the Iran war.

items.title: Syrian Officers Who Hid in Plain Sight Face War Crime Charges in Austria
items.summary: The trial, Austria’s first against Assad regime officials, will be a rare chance for Syrian witnesses to confront two men they have accused of torture.

items.title: Growth Spurt for UK Factories Set to Be Short-Lived, PMI Shows
items.summary: UK factories grew at the fastest pace in four years as the industry sought to get ahead of price increases and supply strains triggered by the Middle East conflict, a key survey found.

items.title: Impact of Middle East war on Hong Kong’s inflation limited, finance chief says
items.summary:
Hong Kong’s finance chief has said the Middle East war has played only a limited role in driving up local inflation, given the city’s service-based economy and stable energy supplies from mainland China mitigated external shocks.

U . S . says it struck Iranian military sites , Tehran responds with air base attack
US says struck Iran military sites, Tehran responds by targeting base
items.summary:
The US said it struck Iranian military sites at the weekend and Iran’s Revolutionary Guards said on Monday it had targeted a US base in response, the latest in a series of exchanges amid negotiations to end the three-month-old ‌war.
